zh.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn是Sir William Mure of Abercorn和Mure的女兒，於1328年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire阿爾可。她於1350年與Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn是Sir William Mure of Abercorn和Mure的女儿，于1328年出生在苏格兰Linlithgowshire阿爾可。她于1350年与Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres在英国苏格兰韋斯特 洛迪安阿爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

en.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn was born in 1328, in Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland as the daughter of Sir William Mure of Abercorn and Mure. She married Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres in 1350, in Abercorn, West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1387, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn est née en 1328, à Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, fille de Sir William Mure of Abercorn et Mure. Elle a épousé Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres en 1350, à Abercorn, West Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn è nata il nel 1328 nel Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland come figlia di Sir William Mure of Abercorn e Mure. Lei sposato Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres nel 1350, nel Abercorn, West Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1387, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercornは1328年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireアバーコルンでSir William Mure of AbercornとMureの娘として生まれた。1350年にイギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンアバーコルンでSir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn(은)는 1328년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 압르코른에서 Sir William Mure of Abercorn(와)과 Mure의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 압르코른에서 Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn nasceu em 1328, em Abercorn, Linlithgowshire, Scotland filha de Sir William Mure of Abercorn e Mure. Ela casou-se com Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres em 1350, em Abercorn, West Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1387, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Christiana Mure of Abercorn родилась в 1328 г. в местности абиркорн, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия. Её родителей звали Sir William Mure of Abercorn и Mure. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres в 1350 г. в местности абиркорн, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Sir William Lindsay of Abercorn and Laird of the Byres en 1350, en Abercorn, West Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1387, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años.
